key_learnings: Substituting ingredients can significantly alter both macronutrient profiles and palatability.
research_findings: Reducing added sugars by 25% in recipes is achievable with minimal taste impact.
current_focus_areas: Developing algorithms to optimize recipes for multiple nutritional goals simultaneously.
